sections.markdown:
- Push strength session
- Horizontal press: bench press, dumbbell press, or weighted push-up, `3 to 5 x 3 to 6`.
- Vertical press or landmine press: `3 x 5 to 8`.
- Accessory push: incline dumbbell press, dips, or push-up variation, `2 to 3 x 6 to 10`.
- Shoulder durability: serratus, rotator cuff, and scapular control, `2 to 3` controlled sets.
- Stop before failure so Thursday running quality and Friday pull work stay clean.
